$comment: Pinned from execution-boundary-core-spec commit 47588ff. Do not modify — update by re-pinning from upstream.
title: ActionEnvelope
description: Structured representation of a proposed action. Immutable after evaluation begins.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for this action instance.

action_type.description: Category or kind of action being proposed (e.g. 'file.write', 'network.send', 'db.delete').

resource.description: Target resource identifier. Format is domain-specific.

context_hash.description: Hash of the execution context at proposal time. Used for integrity verification.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the action was proposed.
